lines.target: Something vs Anything. — Something (afirmativas). Anything (negativas/interrogativas/indiferencia: 'cualquier cosa').
lines.base: Something / Anything. — Uso de 'anything' en diferentes contextos.

lines.target: Possessive Pronouns. — Mine, yours, hers, his, ours, theirs. No article 'the' before them.
Questions with 'How'. — How far? (distancia). How often? (frecuencia). How long? (tiempo/duración).
Shall. — Suggestions/Offers. Shall I open a window? (¿Abro...?).

gap_candidates.target: Shall. — Suggestions/Offers. Shall I open a window? (¿Abro...?).
